[17:13] Arise, O LORD, disappoint him, cast him down: deliver my soul from the wicked, which is thy sword: [17:14] From men which are thy hand, O LORD, from men of the world, which have their portion in this life, and whose belly thou fillest with thy hid treasure: they are full of children, and leave the rest of their substance to their babes. [17:15] As for me, I will behold thy face in righteousness: I shall be satisfied, when I awake, with thy likeness.
ed: Desiring more than is needed or fair; voracious.
ex: 貪婪的；渴望得到超出所需或公平份額的事物。
ds: Fuel refers to something that provides heat or power by burning.
